title: Dual Stratification Dataset: Post-1990 Democratizers Panel (1990-2024)
layman_summary: Panel dataset tracking inequality, education, and democratic quality across 38 countries from 1990-2023, combining V-Dem democracy indicators with World Bank inequality and education data.
summary: Comprehensive merged panel dataset with 1291 country-year observations across 38 countries (1990-2023). Contains V-Dem Liberal Democracy Index (v2x_libdem), Political Equality Index (v2pepwrsoc), World Bank Gini coefficient, education spending as % GDP, and tertiary enrollment rates. dataset has <6% missing data overall. Includes 4 true post-1990 democratizers (Bulgaria, Cape Verde, Latvia, Namibia) plus comparative sample of established democracies. Complete cases: 1223 (94.7%). Data sources: V-Dem v.14, World Bank WDI, Our World in Data education dataset.
